title: Abandoned Shop
lines: You slide into a dark, dusty general store and bolt the door behind you. The village square is filled with the groans of the approaching dead.
The air inside is stale, smelling of dry rot and old canned goods. Moonlight filters through the grimy windows, revealing ransacked shelves.
You take a breath, scanning the shadows for anything useful.

options.desc: 1. Search near the counter for a tool
3. Wait here for a moment to catch your breath
